description_long: This airplane features a sleek, blended wing body design with a wide, gently curved wingspan that merges smoothly into the fuselage. The wings are swept back and appear to have a slight anhedral angle, giving the aircraft a futuristic and aerodynamic profile. Multiple engines are mounted beneath the wings, evenly spaced and integrated into the lower surface. The fuselage is relatively short and broad, with a smooth, continuous surface and a pointed nose. The color scheme transitions from a dark blue or black at the front to a deep red at the rear, creating a striking gradient effect. The tail section is minimal, with no distinct vertical or horizontal stabilizers visible, suggesting a tailless or flying wing configuration.
description: A futuristic, blended wing body airplane with swept-back wings, multiple underwing engines, and a striking blue-to-red gradient finish.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide, curved wingspan and the smooth, pointed nose, with engines barely visible beneath the wings.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the swept-back wings, the gradient color transition, and the underwing engine arrangement.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the tailless design, the even spacing of engines beneath the wings, and the broad, continuous wing-fuselage blend.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the same wing sweep, engine placement, and color gradient.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing, swept-back, blended wing body with slight anhedral angle and no visible winglets.
attribute_engine_type: Six underwing jet engines, evenly spaced along the lower surface of the wings.
attribute_tail_design: Tailless flying wing configuration with no distinct vertical or horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Multiple retractable landing gear units visible beneath the wings and fuselage.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit integrated smoothly into the nose section, likely multi-seat with a continuous canopy.
